description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block constructed from uniformly sized bricks with a reddish-brown and beige color palette. The block features a consistent brick pattern on all visible sides, with mortar lines clearly separating each brick, giving it a robust and solid appearance. The top surface is flat and also covered in the same brick pattern, making it suitable for supporting weight or serving as a platform. The edges are slightly beveled, and the brickwork appears well-aligned, suggesting careful craftsmanship. There are no visible openings, engravings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall finish is matte and slightly rough, typical of masonry used in urban environments for barriers or structural support.
description: A large, rectangular stone block made of reddish-brown and beige bricks with a flat, brick-patterned top and matte, rough finish. It is solid, robust, and utilitarian, suitable for use as a barrier or support structure.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat face with a uniform brick pattern and slightly beveled top edge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same brick pattern and flat top, with no visible seams or features.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, maintaining the consistent brickwork and solid appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, with uniform brick arrangement and no distinguishing marks.
attribute_installation_method: mortared in place on a level foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the bricks and mortar appear clean and well-maintained.
